author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أَبُو القَاسِمِ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بنُ عُمَرَ بنِ نَصْرِ بن مُحَمَّدٍ الشَّيْبَانِيُّ، السَّامَرِّيُّ، ثُمَّ الدِّمَشْقِيُّ، البَزَّازُ
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Hadith scholar and transmitter from Damascus, known for his collection of hadith from his teachers.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of hadith transmissions from the author's teachers, contributing to the broader tradition of hadith compilation in the Islamic scholarly heritage.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the larger corpus of hadith literature, reflecting the transmission of prophetic traditions in the 5th century AH.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: أبو عبد الله حمزة الجزائري is known for his work in hadith tahqiq, though specific reputation details are not widely documented.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The tahqiq involves verifying the chains of narration and ensuring the text's authenticity, typical of hadith scholarship.
